The New York Times published a roundtable discussion between @DAcemogluMIT, @deanwball, @clarashih  & myself about the future of AI & who wins at work. I think it is a really nice overview of the core debates on the topic, and has some fun examples. https://t.co/aizA83fpti

2,000+ mathematicians just signed one document about AI.

Terence Tao endorsed it. Peter Scholze endorsed it. The International Mathematical Union endorsed it.

The outlets covering it are framing it as "AI is overhyped."

They missed the real point. It's the strongest case ever https://t.co/BzbHIAwBQh

This is the Leiden Declaration on AI and Mathematics.

Here's the line the headlines skipped. Today's AI can produce arguments that look correct, read correct, and are nearly impossible to tell apart from a real proof. And are wrong.

So they drew a line. Use the tools, but the

None of this threatens what I do. It's the opposite.

The model is the execution layer. Your thinking is the engine.

This declaration quietly splits the room in two. People who paste a prompt and trust the output, and people who run a thinking system and verify before they

The most credentialed humans on earth just published the operating principle for this entire era.

LLMs don't think; you do.

The people who internalize that build an unfair advantage.

The people who wait for the model to think for them get left holding plausible, confident,

Here's something practical and not based on hype.

Turn Claude into 20+ different specialists for marketing & business.

Install real expertise, not just prompts.

Get my Claude skills bundle 👇
https://t.co/4GX8faMyEP
https://t.co/grZwM3Zasp

想开发发现API也不支持？

Google 的 Gemini 模型并不驱动 Siri  

Siri 是由苹果自研的的基础模型驱动 Siri

不过这个自研的的基础模型是通过Gemini蒸馏训练而来

Google 的Gemini 模型只在 Apple iCloud 上提供额外支持，而且也是苹果定制的，而且也不使用Google 的搜索来提供世界知识，由苹果自己的服务提供。

感觉Google

🔥 高信息差事件（影响力大、中国未广泛讨论）

  1. OpenAI 发布"造福所有人"战略规划（优先级 10）

  - 来源: https://t.co/FZaWPocqth（约 15.6 小时前）
  - 核心内容: OpenAI 宣布第三阶段战略——三大目标：①构建自动化 AI 研究员 ②加速经济 ③给地球每个人一个个人

2. Perplexity CEO 宣布 2028 IPO 计划（优先级 8）

  - 来源: https://t.co/sONpBxzbYv / https://t.co/otTBbMIlV4（约 8-12 小时前）
  - 核心内容: Perplexity CEO Srinivas 表示无论 OpenAI/Anthropic 如何，都瞄准 2028 IPO。关键洞察：
    - "如果 6

3. AI 安全转向"人类层"防御（优先级 7）

  - 来源: https://t.co/hCFdjRtDYw（约 12.8 小时前）
  - 核心内容: AI 骗局激增，安全防御重心从模型层转向人类层
  - 信息差: 6/10 — Agent 安全视角独特，中国讨论少

4. Sam Altman 的 OpenAI "第三阶段"计划（优先级 6）

  - 来源: https://t.co/sONpBxzbYv（约 14.2 小时前）
  - 核心内容: 详细阐述 OpenAI 三阶段路线图，强调"强大系统必须保持安全、对齐人类意图、受人类控制"
  - 信息差: 6/10 — 一手英文源

  5. AI 五天完成数学家多年工作（优先级 6）
